name: quantum-monorepo
description: Quantum framework monorepo — fine-grained reactivity, zero Virtual DOM, direct DOM updates

scripts.build: npm run build -w @quantum/reactivity && npm run build -w @quantum/component && npm run build -w @quantum/renderer && npm run build -w @quantum/router && npm run build -w @quantum/store && npm run build -w @quantum/compiler && npm run build -w @quantum/core

author: IntelligentQuantum
